scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n auth,trips -c yellow,green "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:trips"
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w @tripplanner/auth-service && npm run test -w @tripplanner/trip-service
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w backend && npm run test:coverage -w @tripplanner/auth-service && npm run test:coverage -w @tripplanner/trip-service
scripts.check: npm run check -w backend && npm run check -w @tripplanner/auth-service && npm run check -w @tripplanner/trip-service && npm run check -w frontend
